API Reference¶

This page documents every public class, method, and function in linGAM. Source code for each module is shown at the bottom of its section.

Public classes¶

GAMCore

Multi-term Generalized Additive Model with formula interface.

LinGAM

Penalised B-spline GAM for a single smooth term y = f(x) + eps.

Internal modules¶

These modules are private (single leading underscore) but are documented here for contributors and advanced users.

lingam._bspline¶

Vectorized De Boor B-spline basis construction.

lingam._bspline.b_spline_basis(x_in: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], n_splines: int, spline_order: int, edge_knots: ndarray, periodic: bool = False) → ndarray[source]¶

Construct B-spline basis matrix using vectorized De Boor recursion.

Parameters:

  • x_in (array-like, shape (n,)) – Predictor values at which to evaluate the basis.

  • n_splines (int) – Number of basis functions K. For periodic splines this is the full count before wrapping; the returned matrix has K - spline_order + 1 columns.

  • spline_order (int) – Order k of the B-spline (polynomial degree).

  • edge_knots (np.ndarray, shape (2,)) – Domain boundaries [min, max] for mapping data to [0, 1].

  • periodic (bool, default False) – If True, wrap the first spline_order - 1 basis functions to enforce f(0) = f(1), returning a periodic basis.

Returns:

bases – B-spline basis matrix with linear extrapolation beyond edge knots.

Return type:

np.ndarray, shape (n, K) or (n, K_eff) for periodic

  1"""Vectorized De Boor B-spline basis construction."""
  2
  3import numpy as np
  4from numpy.typing import ArrayLike
  5
  6
  7def b_spline_basis(
  8    x_in: ArrayLike,
  9    n_splines: int,
 10    spline_order: int,
 11    edge_knots: np.ndarray,
 12    periodic: bool = False,
 13) -> np.ndarray:
 14    """Construct B-spline basis matrix using vectorized De Boor recursion.
 15
 16    Parameters
 17    ----------
 18    x_in : array-like, shape (n,)
 19        Predictor values at which to evaluate the basis.
 20    n_splines : int
 21        Number of basis functions K.  For periodic splines this is the
 22        *full* count before wrapping; the returned matrix has
 23        ``K - spline_order + 1`` columns.
 24    spline_order : int
 25        Order k of the B-spline (polynomial degree).
 26    edge_knots : np.ndarray, shape (2,)
 27        Domain boundaries [min, max] for mapping data to [0, 1].
 28    periodic : bool, default False
 29        If True, wrap the first ``spline_order - 1`` basis functions
 30        to enforce f(0) = f(1), returning a periodic basis.
 31
 32    Returns
 33    -------
 34    bases : np.ndarray, shape (n, K) or (n, K_eff) for periodic
 35        B-spline basis matrix with linear extrapolation beyond edge knots.
 36    """
 37    K = n_splines
 38    k = spline_order
 39
 40    offset = edge_knots[0]
 41    scale = edge_knots[1] - edge_knots[0]
 42    if scale == 0.0:
 43        scale = 1.0
 44
 45    boundary_knots = np.linspace(0.0, 1.0, 1 + K - k)
 46    diff = boundary_knots[1] - boundary_knots[0]
 47
 48    x = (np.asarray(x_in).ravel() - offset) / scale
 49    x = np.r_[x, 0.0, 1.0]
 50
 51    if periodic:
 52        x = x % 1.0
 53        x[-2] = 0.0
 54        x[-1] = 1.0
 55
 56    x_extrap_l = x < 0.0
 57    x_extrap_r = x > 1.0
 58    x_interp = ~(x_extrap_l | x_extrap_r)
 59    x = np.atleast_2d(x).T
 60
 61    aug = np.arange(1, k + 1) * diff
 62    aug_knots = np.r_[-aug[::-1], boundary_knots, 1.0 + aug]
 63    aug_knots[-1] += 1e-9
 64
 65    bases = ((x >= aug_knots[:-1]) & (x < aug_knots[1:])).astype(float)
 66    bases[-1] = bases[-2][::-1]
 67
 68    n_active = len(aug_knots) - 1
 69    prev_bases = None
 70
 71    for m in range(2, k + 2):
 72        n_active -= 1
 73        num_l = (x - aug_knots[:n_active]) * bases[:, :n_active]
 74        denom_l = aug_knots[m - 1:n_active + m - 1] - aug_knots[:n_active]
 75        left = num_l / denom_l
 76
 77        num_r = (aug_knots[m:n_active + m] - x) * bases[:, 1:n_active + 1]
 78        denom_r = aug_knots[m:n_active + m] - aug_knots[1:n_active + 1]
 79        right = num_r / denom_r
 80
 81        prev_bases = bases[-2:].copy()
 82        bases = left + right
 83
 84    if (np.any(x_extrap_l) or np.any(x_extrap_r)) and k > 0 and not periodic:
 85        bases[~x_interp] = 0.0
 86        denom_l = aug_knots[k:-1] - aug_knots[:-k - 1]
 87        left_g = prev_bases[:, :-1] / denom_l
 88        denom_r = aug_knots[k + 1:] - aug_knots[1:-k]
 89        right_g = prev_bases[:, 1:] / denom_r
 90        grads = k * (left_g - right_g)
 91
 92        if np.any(x_extrap_l):
 93            bases[x_extrap_l] = grads[0] * x[x_extrap_l] + bases[-2]
 94        if np.any(x_extrap_r):
 95            bases[x_extrap_r] = grads[1] * (x[x_extrap_r] - 1.0) + bases[-1]
 96
 97    result = bases[:-2]
 98
 99    if periodic:
100        n_wrap = k - 1
101        if n_wrap > 0 and n_wrap < K:
102            K_eff = K - n_wrap
103            wrapped = result[:, :K_eff].copy()
104            wrapped[:, :n_wrap] += result[:, K_eff:K_eff + n_wrap]
105            return wrapped
106
107    return result

lingam._formula¶

Formula string parser for GAM terms.

lingam._formula.parse_formula(formula: str) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]¶

Parse a GAM formula string into a list of term configuration dicts.

Supported syntax:

s(feature, n_splines=10, lam=1.0)
te(feature, feature, n_splines=5, lam=0.6)
te(feature, feature, n_splines=[5, 8])
f(feature, lam=0.5, coding='one-hot')
l(feature, lam=0.1)

Terms are separated by +. Positional arguments are feature indices. Keyword arguments are passed through as-is and auto-parsed via ast.literal_eval.

  1"""Formula string parser for GAM terms."""
  2
  3import ast
  4import re
  5from typing import Any, Dict, List
  6
  7
  8def parse_formula(formula: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
  9    """Parse a GAM formula string into a list of term configuration dicts.
 10
 11    Supported syntax::
 12
 13        s(feature, n_splines=10, lam=1.0)
 14        te(feature, feature, n_splines=5, lam=0.6)
 15        te(feature, feature, n_splines=[5, 8])
 16        f(feature, lam=0.5, coding='one-hot')
 17        l(feature, lam=0.1)
 18
 19    Terms are separated by ``+``. Positional arguments are feature indices.
 20    Keyword arguments are passed through as-is and auto-parsed via
 21    ``ast.literal_eval``.
 22    """
 23    if not formula or not formula.strip():
 24        raise ValueError("Formula string is empty.")
 25
 26    stripped = formula.strip()
 27
 28    chunks = _split_by_plus(stripped)
 29
 30    result: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
 31    for chunk in chunks:
 32        chunk = chunk.strip()
 33        m = re.match(r'(\w+)\s*\(([^)]*)\)', chunk)
 34        if not m:
 35            raise ValueError(
 36                f"Cannot parse term '{chunk}'. Expected e.g. s(0, n_splines=10)."
 37            )
 38
 39        func_name = m.group(1).lower()
 40        if func_name not in ('s', 'te', 'f', 'l'):
 41            raise ValueError(
 42                f"Unknown term type '{func_name}'. Expected s, te, f, or l."
 43            )
 44
 45        args_str = m.group(2).strip()
 46        arg_parts = _split_top_level_commas(args_str) if args_str else []
 47
 48        positional: List[Any] = []
 49        kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = {}
 50        for part in arg_parts:
 51            part = part.strip()
 52            if '=' in part:
 53                key, val = part.split('=', 1)
 54                key = key.strip()
 55                val = val.strip()
 56                try:
 57                    kwargs[key] = ast.literal_eval(val)
 58                except (ValueError, SyntaxError):
 59                    kwargs[key] = val
 60            else:
 61                try:
 62                    positional.append(ast.literal_eval(part))
 63                except (ValueError, SyntaxError):
 64                    positional.append(part)
 65
 66        if func_name in ('s', 'f', 'l'):
 67            if len(positional) < 1:
 68                raise ValueError(
 69                    f"'{func_name}()' requires at least one feature index."
 70                )
 71            features = [positional[0]]
 72        else:
 73            if len(positional) < 2:
 74                raise ValueError(
 75                    f"'te()' requires at least two feature indices."
 76                )
 77            features = list(positional)
 78
 79        result.append({
 80            'type': func_name,
 81            'features': features,
 82            'kwargs': kwargs,
 83        })
 84
 85    return result
 86
 87
 88def _split_by_plus(s: str) -> List[str]:
 89    """Split on ``+`` that are not inside parentheses."""
 90    chunks: List[str] = []
 91    depth = 0
 92    current: List[str] = []
 93    for ch in s:
 94        if ch == '(':
 95            depth += 1
 96            current.append(ch)
 97        elif ch == ')':
 98            depth -= 1
 99            current.append(ch)
100        elif ch == '+' and depth == 0:
101            chunks.append(''.join(current))
102            current = []
103        else:
104            current.append(ch)
105    if current:
106        chunks.append(''.join(current))
107    return chunks
108
109
110def _split_top_level_commas(s: str) -> List[str]:
111    """Split on commas that are not inside brackets ``[ ]``."""
112    parts: List[str] = []
113    depth = 0
114    current: List[str] = []
115    for ch in s:
116        if ch == '[':
117            depth += 1
118            current.append(ch)
119        elif ch == ']':
120            depth -= 1
121            current.append(ch)
122        elif ch == ',' and depth == 0:
123            parts.append(''.join(current))
124            current = []
125        else:
126            current.append(ch)
127    if current:
128        parts.append(''.join(current))
129    return parts

lingam._gam¶

Multi-term GAM with formula interface, grid search, and diagnostics.

class lingam._gam.GAMCore(formula: str, spline_order: int = 3, fit_intercept: bool = True)[source]¶

Multi-term Generalized Additive Model with formula interface.

Parameters:

  • formula (str) –

    Model specification, e.g. "s(0, n_splines=10) + te(1, 2) + f(3) + l(4)".

    Spline terms support a constraint keyword for shape constraints: None (default, smooth), 'mono_inc', 'mono_dec', 'convex', 'concave', 'periodic'.

    Example:

    GAMCore("s(0, constraint='mono_inc') + s(1, constraint='periodic')")

  • spline_order (int, default 3) – B-spline order (polynomial degree) for all spline/te terms.

  • fit_intercept (bool, default True) – Whether to include an unpenalised intercept term.

property is_fitted: bool¶
property n_terms: int¶
fit(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], y: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], robust: bool = False) → GAMCore[source]¶
predict(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str]) → ndarray[source]¶
partial_dependence(term_idx: int, x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str]) → ndarray[source]¶
confidence_intervals(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], width: float = 0.95) → ndarray[source]¶
prediction_intervals(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], width: float = 0.95) → ndarray[source]¶
loglikelihood() → float[source]¶

Gaussian log-likelihood of the fitted model.

aic() → float[source]¶

Akaike Information Criterion (AIC).

bic() → float[source]¶

Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC).

deviance_explained() → float[source]¶

Fraction of null deviance explained (pseudo R-squared).

Computed as 1 - RSS / TSS where TSS is the total sum of squares around the mean of y.

gridsearch(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], y: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], lam_grids: List[Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str]] | None = None, n_splines_grids: List[Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str]] | None = None, gamma: float = 1.4, robust: bool = False, search_terms: List[str | int] | str | None = None) → GAMCore[source]¶

Select optimal hyper-parameters via GCV grid search.

Always uses the fast QR+Cholesky path. When robust=True, each candidate is evaluated with Huber IRLS (iterative reweighting inside the Cholesky solve).

Parameters:

  • x (array-like) – Training data.

  • y (array-like) – Training data.

  • lam_grids (list of array-like, optional) – Per-slot candidate lambda arrays. Default: logspace(-3, 3, 11).

  • n_splines_grids (list of array-like, optional) – Per-slot candidate n_splines arrays (s/te only). Default: arange(5, 25, 2) for s(), arange(4, 8) for te().

  • gamma (float, default 1.4) – EDF penalty multiplier in GCV denominator.

  • robust (bool, default False) – Use Huber IRLS for evaluation.

  • search_terms (None | str | list of int/str, optional) – Which terms to search hyper-parameters for.

Returns:

Fitted model with best hyper-parameters.

Return type:

GAMCore

plot_decomposition(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], y: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], n_grid: int = 200, extrap_frac: float = 0.15, figsize: Tuple[int, int] | None = None) → Tuple[source]¶
  1"""Multi-term GAM with formula interface, grid search, and diagnostics."""
  2
  3from __future__ import annotations
  4
  5from itertools import product as cartesian_product
  6from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
  7from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set, Tuple, Union
  8
  9import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
 10import numpy as np
 11from numpy.typing import ArrayLike
 12from scipy import stats
 13from scipy.linalg import block_diag, cho_factor, cho_solve
 14
 15from ._formula import parse_formula
 16from ._solver import irls_solve, solve_pirls
 17from ._terms import (
 18    _FactorTerm,
 19    _LinearTerm,
 20    _SplineTerm,
 21    _TensorTerm,
 22    _Term,
 23    instantiate_terms,
 24)
 25
 26
 27class GAMCore:
 28    """Multi-term Generalized Additive Model with formula interface.
 29
 30    Parameters
 31    ----------
 32    formula : str
 33        Model specification, e.g.
 34        ``"s(0, n_splines=10) + te(1, 2) + f(3) + l(4)"``.
 35
 36        Spline terms support a ``constraint`` keyword for shape
 37        constraints: ``None`` (default, smooth), ``'mono_inc'``,
 38        ``'mono_dec'``, ``'convex'``, ``'concave'``, ``'periodic'``.
 39
 40        Example::
 41
 42            GAMCore("s(0, constraint='mono_inc') + s(1, constraint='periodic')")
 43
 44    spline_order : int, default 3
 45        B-spline order (polynomial degree) for all spline/te terms.
 46    fit_intercept : bool, default True
 47        Whether to include an unpenalised intercept term.
 48    """
 49
 50    def __init__(
 51        self,
 52        formula: str,
 53        spline_order: int = 3,
 54        fit_intercept: bool = True,
 55    ) -> None:
 56        self.formula = formula
 57        self.spline_order = spline_order
 58        self.fit_intercept = fit_intercept
 59
 60        configs = parse_formula(formula)
 61        self._terms: List[_Term] = instantiate_terms(configs, spline_order)
 62        self._term_configs = configs
 63
 64        self._coef_slices: List[Tuple[int, int]] = []
 65        self.coef_: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
 66        self.statistics_: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
 67        self._B_solve: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
 68        self._design_matrix_: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
 69
 70    @property
 71    def is_fitted(self) -> bool:
 72        return self.coef_ is not None
 73
 74    @property
 75    def n_terms(self) -> int:
 76        return len(self._terms)
 77
 78    def _check_fitted(self) -> None:
 79        if not self.is_fitted:
 80            raise RuntimeError(
 81                "Model not fitted. Call fit() or gridsearch() first."
 82            )
 83
 84    def __repr__(self) -> str:
 85        status = "fitted" if self.is_fitted else "unfitted"
 86        return f"GAMCore(formula='{self.formula}') [{status}]"
 87
 88    def _compile(self, x: np.ndarray) -> None:
 89        for term in self._terms:
 90            term.compile(x)
 91
 92    def _total_coefs(self) -> int:
 93        total = sum(t.n_coefs for t in self._terms)
 94        if self.fit_intercept:
 95            total += 1
 96        return total
 97
 98    def _build_model_matrix(self, x: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
 99        blocks = [t.build_columns(x) for t in self._terms]
100        if self.fit_intercept:
101            blocks.append(np.ones((len(x), 1)))
102        return np.hstack(blocks)
103
104    def _build_penalty(self) -> np.ndarray:
105        blocks = [t.build_penalty() for t in self._terms]
106        if self.fit_intercept:
107            blocks.append(np.zeros((1, 1)))
108        return blocks[0] if len(blocks) == 1 else block_diag(*blocks)
109
110    def _compute_coef_slices(self) -> None:
111        slices = []
112        offset = 0
113        for t in self._terms:
114            slices.append((offset, offset + t.n_coefs))
115            offset += t.n_coefs
116        self._coef_slices = slices
117
118    # ── fit ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
119
120    def fit(
121        self,
122        x: ArrayLike,
123        y: ArrayLike,
124        robust: bool = False,
125    ) -> "GAMCore":
126        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
127        y_arr = np.asarray(y).ravel()
128        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
129            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
130        if not self.is_fitted:
131            self._compile(x_arr)
132        self._fit_internal(x_arr, y_arr, robust=robust)
133        return self
134
135    def _fit_internal(
136        self,
137        x: np.ndarray,
138        y: np.ndarray,
139        robust: bool = False,
140    ) -> None:
141        n = len(x)
142        X = self._build_model_matrix(x)
143        self._design_matrix_ = X
144        P = self._build_penalty()
145        self._compute_coef_slices()
146
147        if robust:
148            coef, U1, B_solve, w, _ = irls_solve(X, y, P, n_iter=15)
149            y_hat = X @ coef
150            rss = np.sum(w * (y - y_hat) ** 2)
151        else:
152            coef, U1, B_solve = solve_pirls(X, y, P)
153            y_hat = X @ coef
154            rss = np.sum((y - y_hat) ** 2)
155
156        self.coef_ = coef
157        self._B_solve = B_solve
158
159        edof_per_coef = np.sum(U1 ** 2, axis=1)
160        edof = np.sum(edof_per_coef)
161
162        scale = np.sqrt(rss / max(n - edof, 1))
163        cov = (B_solve @ B_solve.T) * scale ** 2
164        se = np.sqrt(np.diag(cov))
165
166        self.statistics_ = {
167            'edof': edof,
168            'edof_per_coef': edof_per_coef,
169            'scale': scale,
170            'cov': cov,
171            'se': se,
172            'rss': rss,
173            'n_samples': n,
174            'GCV': (n * rss) / max(n - 1.4 * edof, 1) ** 2,
175        }
176
177    # ── predict / partial_dependence ──────────────────────────────
178
179    def predict(self, x: ArrayLike) -> np.ndarray:
180        self._check_fitted()
181        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
182        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
183            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
184        X = self._build_model_matrix(x_arr)
185        return X @ self.coef_
186
187    def partial_dependence(self, term_idx: int, x: ArrayLike) -> np.ndarray:
188        self._check_fitted()
189        if term_idx < 0 or term_idx >= len(self._terms):
190            raise IndexError(
191                f"term_idx {term_idx} out of range (0..{len(self._terms) - 1})."
192            )
193        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
194        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
195            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
196        B_term = self._terms[term_idx].build_columns(x_arr)
197        start, end = self._coef_slices[term_idx]
198        return B_term @ self.coef_[start:end]
199
200    # ── intervals ────────────────────────────────────────────────
201
202    def confidence_intervals(self, x: ArrayLike, width: float = 0.95) -> np.ndarray:
203        return self._compute_intervals(x, width, prediction=False)
204
205    def prediction_intervals(self, x: ArrayLike, width: float = 0.95) -> np.ndarray:
206        return self._compute_intervals(x, width, prediction=True)
207
208    def _compute_intervals(
209        self, x: np.ndarray, width: float, prediction: bool,
210    ) -> np.ndarray:
211        self._check_fitted()
212        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
213        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
214            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
215        X = self._build_model_matrix(x_arr)
216        lp = X @ self.coef_
217
218        cov = self.statistics_['cov']
219        var = np.sum((X @ cov) * X, axis=1)
220        if prediction:
221            var += self.statistics_['scale'] ** 2
222
223        alpha = (1.0 - width) / 2.0
224        df = max(self.statistics_['n_samples'] - self.statistics_['edof'], 1)
225        q_lo = stats.t.ppf(alpha, df=df)
226        q_hi = stats.t.ppf(1.0 - alpha, df=df)
227
228        se = np.sqrt(var)
229        return np.column_stack([lp + q_lo * se, lp + q_hi * se])
230
231    # ── statistics ────────────────────────────────────────────────
232
233    def loglikelihood(self) -> float:
234        """Gaussian log-likelihood of the fitted model."""
235        self._check_fitted()
236        n = self.statistics_['n_samples']
237        rss = self.statistics_['rss']
238        scale = self.statistics_['scale']
239        return -0.5 * n * np.log(2 * np.pi * scale ** 2) - 0.5 * rss / scale ** 2
240
241    def aic(self) -> float:
242        """Akaike Information Criterion (AIC)."""
243        self._check_fitted()
244        return -2 * self.loglikelihood() + 2 * (self.statistics_['edof'] + 1)
245
246    def bic(self) -> float:
247        """Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC)."""
248        self._check_fitted()
249        n = self.statistics_['n_samples']
250        k = self.statistics_['edof'] + 1
251        return -2 * self.loglikelihood() + np.log(n) * k
252
253    def deviance_explained(self) -> float:
254        """Fraction of null deviance explained (pseudo R-squared).
255
256        Computed as ``1 - RSS / TSS`` where TSS is the total sum of
257        squares around the mean of y.
258        """
259        self._check_fitted()
260        y = self._design_matrix_ @ self.coef_ + self.statistics_['rss'] / self.statistics_['n_samples']
261        n = self.statistics_['n_samples']
262        X = self._design_matrix_
263        y_hat = X @ self.coef_
264        y_mean = np.mean(y_hat + np.sqrt(self.statistics_['rss'] / n))
265        tss = np.sum((y_hat - y_mean) ** 2) + self.statistics_['rss']
266        if tss == 0:
267            return 0.0
268        return max(0.0, 1.0 - self.statistics_['rss'] / tss)
269
270    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
271    #  Grid Search
272    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
273
274    def gridsearch(
275        self,
276        x: ArrayLike,
277        y: ArrayLike,
278        lam_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
279        n_splines_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
280        gamma: float = 1.4,
281        robust: bool = False,
282        search_terms: Optional[Union[List[Union[int, str]], str]] = None,
283    ) -> "GAMCore":
284        """Select optimal hyper-parameters via GCV grid search.
285
286        Always uses the fast QR+Cholesky path.  When ``robust=True``,
287        each candidate is evaluated with Huber IRLS (iterative
288        reweighting inside the Cholesky solve).
289
290        Parameters
291        ----------
292        x, y : array-like
293            Training data.
294        lam_grids : list of array-like, optional
295            Per-slot candidate lambda arrays. Default: logspace(-3, 3, 11).
296        n_splines_grids : list of array-like, optional
297            Per-slot candidate n_splines arrays (s/te only).
298            Default: arange(5, 25, 2) for s(), arange(4, 8) for te().
299        gamma : float, default 1.4
300            EDF penalty multiplier in GCV denominator.
301        robust : bool, default False
302            Use Huber IRLS for evaluation.
303        search_terms : None | str | list of int/str, optional
304            Which terms to search hyper-parameters for.
305
306        Returns
307        -------
308        GAMCore
309            Fitted model with best hyper-parameters.
310        """
311        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
312        y_arr = np.asarray(y).ravel()
313        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
314            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
315
316        if robust:
317            return self._gridsearch_robust(
318                x_arr, y_arr,
319                lam_grids=lam_grids,
320                n_splines_grids=n_splines_grids,
321                gamma=gamma,
322                search_terms=search_terms,
323            )
324        return self._gridsearch(
325            x_arr, y_arr,
326            lam_grids=lam_grids,
327            n_splines_grids=n_splines_grids,
328            gamma=gamma,
329            search_terms=search_terms,
330        )
331
332    # ── search_terms resolution ──────────────────────────────────
333
334    def _resolve_search_terms(
335        self,
336        search_terms: Optional[Union[List[Union[int, str]], str]],
337    ) -> Set[int]:
338        if search_terms is None:
339            return set(range(len(self._terms)))
340        if isinstance(search_terms, str):
341            if search_terms == "all":
342                return set(range(len(self._terms)))
343            return self._indices_for_type(search_terms)
344
345        indices: Set[int] = set()
346        for item in search_terms:
347            if isinstance(item, int):
348                if item < 0 or item >= len(self._terms):
349                    raise IndexError(
350                        f"Term index {item} out of range "
351                        f"(0..{len(self._terms) - 1})."
352                    )
353                indices.add(item)
354            elif isinstance(item, str):
355                indices.update(self._indices_for_type(item))
356            else:
357                raise TypeError(
358                    f"Invalid search_terms element: {item!r}. "
359                    f"Expected int or str."
360                )
361        return indices
362
363    def _indices_for_type(self, kind: str) -> Set[int]:
364        type_map = {
365            's': _SplineTerm, 'te': _TensorTerm,
366            'f': _FactorTerm, 'l': _LinearTerm,
367        }
368        kind_lower = kind.lower()
369        if kind_lower not in type_map:
370            raise ValueError(
371                f"Unknown term type '{kind}'. Expected s, te, f, or l."
372            )
373        cls = type_map[kind_lower]
374        return {i for i, t in enumerate(self._terms) if isinstance(t, cls)}
375
376    # ── grid construction ────────────────────────────────────────
377
378    def _build_default_grids(
379        self,
380        x: np.ndarray,
381        lam_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]],
382        n_splines_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]],
383        search_terms: Optional[Union[List[Union[int, str]], str]] = None,
384    ) -> Tuple[List[np.ndarray], List[np.ndarray]]:
385        search_idx = self._resolve_search_terms(search_terms)
386
387        n_lam_slots = sum(
388            t.d if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm) else 1
389            for t in self._terms
390        )
391        n_nsp_slots = sum(
392            t.d if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm) else 1
393            for t in self._terms
394            if isinstance(t, (_SplineTerm, _TensorTerm))
395        )
396
397        if lam_grids is None:
398            _default_lam = [np.logspace(-3, 3, 11)]
399            lam_grids = []
400            for t in self._terms:
401                n_slots = t.d if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm) else 1
402                lam_grids.extend(_default_lam * n_slots)
403        elif not isinstance(lam_grids, list):
404            lam_grids = [np.atleast_1d(lam_grids)] * n_lam_slots
405        elif len(lam_grids) == 1 and n_lam_slots > 1:
406            lam_grids = lam_grids * n_lam_slots
407        elif len(lam_grids) != n_lam_slots:
408            raise ValueError(
409                f"lam_grids has {len(lam_grids)} elements, "
410                f"but model requires {n_lam_slots} lam slots "
411                f"({self.formula})."
412            )
413
414        if n_splines_grids is None:
415            n_splines_grids = []
416            for t in self._terms:
417                if isinstance(t, _SplineTerm):
418                    n_splines_grids.append(np.arange(5, 25, 2))
419                elif isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
420                    n_splines_grids.extend([np.arange(4, 8)] * t.d)
421        elif not isinstance(n_splines_grids, list):
422            n_splines_grids = [np.atleast_1d(n_splines_grids)] * max(n_nsp_slots, 1)
423        elif len(n_splines_grids) == 1 and n_nsp_slots > 1:
424            n_splines_grids = n_splines_grids * n_nsp_slots
425        elif len(n_splines_grids) != n_nsp_slots:
426            raise ValueError(
427                f"n_splines_grids has {len(n_splines_grids)} elements, "
428                f"but model requires {n_nsp_slots} n_splines slots "
429                f"({self.formula})."
430            )
431
432        lam_grids = list(lam_grids)
433        n_splines_grids = list(n_splines_grids)
434
435        lam_idx = 0
436        nsp_idx = 0
437        for i, t in enumerate(self._terms):
438            if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
439                n_lam = t.d
440                n_nsp = t.d
441            elif isinstance(t, _SplineTerm):
442                n_lam = 1
443                n_nsp = 1
444            elif isinstance(t, (_FactorTerm, _LinearTerm)):
445                n_lam = 1
446                n_nsp = 0
447            else:
448                n_lam = 1
449                n_nsp = 0
450
451            if i not in search_idx:
452                if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
453                    lam_grids[lam_idx:lam_idx + n_lam] = [
454                        np.array([v]) for v in t.lam_per
455                    ]
456                    n_splines_grids[nsp_idx:nsp_idx + n_nsp] = [
457                        np.array([v]) for v in t.n_splines_per
458                    ]
459                else:
460                    lam_grids[lam_idx] = np.array([t.lam])
461                    if isinstance(t, _SplineTerm):
462                        n_splines_grids[nsp_idx] = np.array([t.n_splines])
463
464            lam_idx += n_lam
465            nsp_idx += n_nsp
466
467        self._compile(x)
468        return lam_grids, n_splines_grids
469
470    # ── fast grid search (Cholesky) ───────────────────────────────
471
472    def _gridsearch(
473        self,
474        x: np.ndarray,
475        y: np.ndarray,
476        lam_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
477        n_splines_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
478        gamma: float = 1.4,
479        search_terms: Optional[Union[List[Union[int, str]], str]] = None,
480    ) -> "GAMCore":
481        lam_grids, n_splines_grids = self._build_default_grids(
482            x, lam_grids, n_splines_grids, search_terms,
483        )
484        n = len(y)
485
486        nsp_idx = 0
487        k_combo_elements: List[List] = []
488        for t in self._terms:
489            if isinstance(t, _SplineTerm):
490                grid = np.atleast_1d(n_splines_grids[nsp_idx])
491                k_combo_elements.append([int(v) for v in grid])
492                nsp_idx += 1
493            elif isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
494                grids = [
495                    np.atleast_1d(g)
496                    for g in n_splines_grids[nsp_idx:nsp_idx + t.d]
497                ]
498                combos = [
499                    tuple(int(v) for v in c)
500                    for c in cartesian_product(*grids)
501                ]
502                k_combo_elements.append(combos)
503                nsp_idx += t.d
504            else:
505                k_combo_elements.append([None])
506
507        all_k_combos = list(cartesian_product(*k_combo_elements))
508        lam_combos = list(cartesian_product(*lam_grids))
509
510        def _precompute_k(k_combo):
511            configs_copy = [dict(cfg) for cfg in self._term_configs]
512            for ci, cfg in enumerate(configs_copy):
513                k_val = k_combo[ci]
514                if cfg['type'] == 's' and k_val is not None:
515                    cfg['kwargs']['n_splines'] = k_val
516                elif cfg['type'] == 'te' and k_val is not None:
517                    cfg['kwargs']['n_splines'] = (
518                        list(k_val) if len(k_val) > 1 else k_val[0]
519                    )
520            terms_copy = instantiate_terms(configs_copy, self.spline_order)
521            for t in terms_copy:
522                t.compile(x)
523            X_k = _build_matrix_from_terms(terms_copy, x, self.fit_intercept)
524            Q, R = np.linalg.qr(X_k)
525            RtR = R.T @ R
526            Rt_qty = R.T @ (Q.T @ y)
527            bases_list, m = _precompute_penalty_bases(
528                terms_copy, self.fit_intercept,
529            )
530            return X_k, RtR, Rt_qty, bases_list, m, terms_copy
531
532        with ThreadPoolExecutor() as executor:
533            precomputed = list(executor.map(_precompute_k, all_k_combos))
534
535        n_k = len(precomputed)
536
537        def _eval_k_combo(k_idx):
538            X_pc, RtR, Rt_qty, bases_list, m, terms_pc = precomputed[k_idx]
539            P_buf = np.zeros((m, m))
540            B_buf = np.empty((m, m))
541            best_gcv_k = np.inf
542            best_l_idx = -1
543
544            for l_idx, l_combo in enumerate(lam_combos):
545                _assemble_penalty_from_bases(
546                    bases_list, l_combo, m, self.fit_intercept, out=P_buf,
547                )
548                np.add(RtR, P_buf, out=B_buf)
549                B_buf.flat[::m + 1] += 1e-12
550                try:
551                    c_chol, lower = cho_factor(
552                        B_buf, overwrite_a=True, check_finite=False,
553                    )
554                    coef = cho_solve((c_chol, lower), Rt_qty, check_finite=False)
555                    B_inv_RtR = cho_solve(
556                        (c_chol, lower), RtR, check_finite=False,
557                    )
558                    edf = float(np.trace(B_inv_RtR))
559                except Exception:
560                    B_fallback = RtR + P_buf
561                    B_fallback.flat[::m + 1] += 1e-12
562                    coef = np.linalg.solve(B_fallback, Rt_qty)
563                    edf = float(np.trace(np.linalg.solve(B_fallback, RtR)))
564
565                residuals = y - X_pc @ coef
566                rss = float(residuals @ residuals)
567                gcv = (n * rss) / max(n - gamma * edf, 1) ** 2
568
569                if gcv < best_gcv_k:
570                    best_gcv_k = gcv
571                    best_l_idx = l_idx
572
573            return best_gcv_k, k_idx, best_l_idx
574
575        with ThreadPoolExecutor() as executor:
576            k_results = list(executor.map(_eval_k_combo, range(n_k)))
577
578        best_gcv = np.inf
579        best_k_idx = 0
580        best_l_idx = 0
581        for gcv_val, k_idx, l_idx in k_results:
582            if gcv_val < best_gcv:
583                best_gcv = gcv_val
584                best_k_idx = k_idx
585                best_l_idx = l_idx
586
587        _, _, _, _, _, best_terms = precomputed[best_k_idx]
588        best_l_combo = lam_combos[best_l_idx]
589        self._terms = best_terms
590        _set_lams_from_combo(self._terms, best_l_combo)
591        self._compile(x)
592        self._fit_internal(x, y, robust=False)
593        return self
594
595    # ── robust grid search (IRLS) ─────────────────────────────────
596
597    def _gridsearch_robust(
598        self,
599        x: np.ndarray,
600        y: np.ndarray,
601        lam_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
602        n_splines_grids: Optional[List[ArrayLike]] = None,
603        gamma: float = 1.4,
604        search_terms: Optional[Union[List[Union[int, str]], str]] = None,
605    ) -> "GAMCore":
606        lam_grids, n_splines_grids = self._build_default_grids(
607            x, lam_grids, n_splines_grids, search_terms,
608        )
609        n = len(y)
610
611        nsp_idx = 0
612        k_combo_elements: List[List] = []
613        for t in self._terms:
614            if isinstance(t, _SplineTerm):
615                grid = np.atleast_1d(n_splines_grids[nsp_idx])
616                k_combo_elements.append([int(v) for v in grid])
617                nsp_idx += 1
618            elif isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
619                grids = [
620                    np.atleast_1d(g)
621                    for g in n_splines_grids[nsp_idx:nsp_idx + t.d]
622                ]
623                combos = [
624                    tuple(int(v) for v in c)
625                    for c in cartesian_product(*grids)
626                ]
627                k_combo_elements.append(combos)
628                nsp_idx += t.d
629            else:
630                k_combo_elements.append([None])
631
632        all_k_combos = list(cartesian_product(*k_combo_elements))
633        lam_combos = list(cartesian_product(*lam_grids))
634
635        def _precompute_k(k_combo):
636            configs_copy = [dict(cfg) for cfg in self._term_configs]
637            for ci, cfg in enumerate(configs_copy):
638                k_val = k_combo[ci]
639                if cfg['type'] == 's' and k_val is not None:
640                    cfg['kwargs']['n_splines'] = k_val
641                elif cfg['type'] == 'te' and k_val is not None:
642                    cfg['kwargs']['n_splines'] = (
643                        list(k_val) if len(k_val) > 1 else k_val[0]
644                    )
645            terms_copy = instantiate_terms(configs_copy, self.spline_order)
646            for t in terms_copy:
647                t.compile(x)
648            X_k = _build_matrix_from_terms(terms_copy, x, self.fit_intercept)
649            bases_list, m = _precompute_penalty_bases(
650                terms_copy, self.fit_intercept,
651            )
652            return X_k, bases_list, m, terms_copy
653
654        with ThreadPoolExecutor() as executor:
655            precomputed = list(executor.map(_precompute_k, all_k_combos))
656
657        best_gcv = np.inf
658        best_result: Optional[tuple] = None
659
660        for k_idx, k_combo in enumerate(all_k_combos):
661            X_full, bases_list, m, terms_k = precomputed[k_idx]
662            P_buf = np.zeros((m, m))
663
664            def _eval_lam(l_combo):
665                _assemble_penalty_from_bases(
666                    bases_list, l_combo, m, self.fit_intercept, out=P_buf,
667                )
668                P_full = P_buf.copy()
669                coef, U1, _, _, _ = irls_solve(
670                    X_full, y, P_full, n_iter=10,
671                )
672                residuals = y - X_full @ coef
673                rss = float(residuals @ residuals)
674                edf = float(np.sum(U1 ** 2))
675                gcv = (n * rss) / max(n - gamma * edf, 1) ** 2
676                return gcv, coef, edf, l_combo
677
678            with ThreadPoolExecutor() as executor:
679                results = list(executor.map(_eval_lam, lam_combos))
680
681            for gcv_val, coef_val, edf_val, l_combo in results:
682                if gcv_val < best_gcv:
683                    best_gcv = gcv_val
684                    best_result = (
685                        gcv_val, k_combo, l_combo,
686                        coef_val, edf_val, terms_k,
687                    )
688
689        if best_result is None:
690            raise RuntimeError("Grid search failed: no valid result.")
691
692        _, best_k_combo, best_l_combo, best_coef_vec, best_edf, best_terms = best_result
693        self._terms = best_terms
694        _set_lams_from_combo(self._terms, best_l_combo)
695        self._compile(x)
696        self._fit_internal(x, y, robust=True)
697        return self
698
699    # ── plotting ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
700
701    def plot_decomposition(
702        self,
703        x: ArrayLike,
704        y: ArrayLike,
705        n_grid: int = 200,
706        extrap_frac: float = 0.15,
707        figsize: Optional[Tuple[int, int]] = None,
708    ) -> Tuple:
709        self._check_fitted()
710        x_arr = np.asarray(x)
711        y_arr = np.asarray(y).ravel()
712        if x_arr.ndim == 1:
713            x_arr = x_arr.reshape(-1, 1)
714
715        p_predictors = x_arr.shape[1]
716        n_terms = len(self._terms)
717        n_term_cols = min(3, n_terms)
718        n_term_rows = int(np.ceil(n_terms / n_term_cols)) if n_terms > 0 else 0
719        n_rows = 1 + n_term_rows
720        n_cols = max(n_term_cols, 1)
721
722        if figsize is None:
723            figsize = (n_cols * 5, n_rows * 4)
724
725        fig = plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
726        gs = fig.add_gridspec(n_rows, n_cols, hspace=0.4, wspace=0.35)
727
728        ax_overall = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])
729
730        feat_mins = np.min(x_arr, axis=0)
731        feat_maxs = np.max(x_arr, axis=0)
732        medians = np.median(x_arr, axis=0)
733
734        feat_grids = []
735        for j in range(p_predictors):
736            rng = feat_maxs[j] - feat_mins[j]
737            if rng == 0:
738                rng = 1.0
739            lo = feat_mins[j] - extrap_frac * rng
740            hi = feat_maxs[j] + extrap_frac * rng
741            feat_grids.append(np.linspace(lo, hi, n_grid))
742
743        x_overall = np.tile(medians, (n_grid, 1))
744        x_overall[:, 0] = feat_grids[0]
745        y_overall = self.predict(x_overall)
746        sort_idx = np.argsort(x_overall[:, 0])
747        ax_overall.plot(
748            x_overall[sort_idx, 0], y_overall[sort_idx],
749            'C0-', lw=2, label='GAM fit',
750        )
751        ax_overall.scatter(
752            x_arr[:, 0], y_arr, alpha=0.4, color='gray', s=10, label='Data',
753        )
754
755        x_lo, x_hi = feat_grids[0][0], feat_grids[0][-1]
756        ax_overall.axvspan(x_lo, feat_mins[0], alpha=0.06, color='red')
757        ax_overall.axvspan(
758            feat_maxs[0], x_hi, alpha=0.06, color='red', label='Extrapolated',
759        )
760        ax_overall.set_xlabel('x[0]' if p_predictors > 1 else 'x')
761        ax_overall.set_ylabel('y')
762
763        constraint_info = ""
764        constrained_terms = [
765            (i, t) for i, t in enumerate(self._terms)
766            if isinstance(t, _SplineTerm) and t.constraint
767        ]
768        if constrained_terms:
769            constraint_info = "  constraints: " + ", ".join(
770                f"s({t.feature})={t.constraint}" for _, t in constrained_terms
771            )
772
773        ax_overall.set_title(
774            f'GAM Fit  (GCV={self.statistics_["GCV"]:.3f}, '
775            f'EDF={self.statistics_["edof"]:.1f}, '
776            f'n={self.statistics_["n_samples"]}){constraint_info}'
777        )
778        ax_overall.legend(fontsize=7, loc='best')
779
780        for i, term in enumerate(self._terms):
781            row = 1 + i // n_term_cols
782            col = i % n_term_cols
783            ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[row, col])
784
785            if isinstance(term, _SplineTerm):
786                x_sweep = np.tile(medians, (n_grid, 1))
787                x_sweep[:, term.feature] = feat_grids[term.feature]
788                pdep = self.partial_dependence(i, x_sweep)
789                fv = feat_grids[term.feature]
790                sort_idx_i = np.argsort(fv)
791
792                label = f's({term.feature})'
793                if term.constraint:
794                    label += f' [{term.constraint}]'
795                ax.plot(
796                    fv[sort_idx_i], pdep[sort_idx_i],
797                    'C1-', lw=2, label=label,
798                )
799                ax.axvspan(fv[0], feat_mins[term.feature], alpha=0.06, color='red')
800                ax.axvspan(feat_maxs[term.feature], fv[-1], alpha=0.06, color='red')
801                ax.axhline(0, color='gray', ls='--', lw=0.5)
802                ax.set_xlabel(f'x[{term.feature}]')
803                ax.set_ylabel('Contribution')
804                title = f's({term.feature})   K={term.n_splines}, lam={term.lam:.3f}'
805                if term.constraint:
806                    title += f'  [{term.constraint}]'
807                ax.set_title(title)
808                ax.legend(fontsize=7)
809
810            elif isinstance(term, _TensorTerm):
811                if term.d == 2:
812                    ng2d = min(n_grid, 75)
813                    g0 = np.linspace(
814                        feat_mins[term.features[0]]
815                        - extrap_frac * (feat_maxs[term.features[0]] - feat_mins[term.features[0]]),
816                        feat_maxs[term.features[0]]
817                        + extrap_frac * (feat_maxs[term.features[0]] - feat_mins[term.features[0]]),
818                        ng2d,
819                    )
820                    g1 = np.linspace(
821                        feat_mins[term.features[1]]
822                        - extrap_frac * (feat_maxs[term.features[1]] - feat_mins[term.features[1]]),
823                        feat_maxs[term.features[1]]
824                        + extrap_frac * (feat_maxs[term.features[1]] - feat_mins[term.features[1]]),
825                        ng2d,
826                    )
827                    f0, f1 = np.meshgrid(g0, g1, indexing='ij')
828                    x_2d = np.tile(medians, (ng2d * ng2d, 1))
829                    x_2d[:, term.features[0]] = f0.ravel()
830                    x_2d[:, term.features[1]] = f1.ravel()
831                    pdep = self.partial_dependence(i, x_2d)
832                    pdep_2d = pdep.reshape(ng2d, ng2d)
833                    im = ax.pcolormesh(f0, f1, pdep_2d, shading='auto', cmap='RdBu_r')
834                    plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, label='Contribution')
835                    ax.set_xlabel(f'x[{term.features[0]}]')
836                    ax.set_ylabel(f'x[{term.features[1]}]')
837                else:
838                    x_sweep = np.tile(medians, (n_grid, 1))
839                    x_sweep[:, term.features[0]] = feat_grids[term.features[0]]
840                    pdep = self.partial_dependence(i, x_sweep)
841                    fv = feat_grids[term.features[0]]
842                    ax.plot(fv, pdep, 'C2-', lw=1.5)
843                    ax.set_xlabel(f'x[{term.features[0]}] (projection)')
844                feats_str = ','.join(str(f) for f in term.features)
845                ks_str = ','.join(str(k) for k in term.n_splines_per)
846                ax.set_title(f'te({feats_str})   K=({ks_str})   {term.n_coefs} coefs')
847
848            elif isinstance(term, _FactorTerm):
849                col_vals = np.asarray(x_arr[:, term.feature]).ravel()
850                unique_levels = np.unique(col_vals)
851                level_contribs = []
852                for lvl in unique_levels:
853                    x_lvl = medians.copy().reshape(1, -1)
854                    x_lvl[0, term.feature] = lvl
855                    contrib = self.partial_dependence(i, x_lvl)
856                    level_contribs.append(contrib[0])
857                colors = ['C2' if v >= 0 else 'C3' for v in level_contribs]
858                ax.bar(
859                    range(len(level_contribs)), level_contribs,
860                    color=colors, edgecolor='k', lw=0.5,
861                )
862                ax.axhline(0, color='gray', ls='-', lw=0.5)
863                ax.set_xticks(range(len(level_contribs)))
864                ax.set_xticklabels(unique_levels, fontsize=8)
865                ax.set_ylabel('Contribution')
866                ax.set_title(f'f({term.feature})   lam={term.lam:.3f}')
867
868            elif isinstance(term, _LinearTerm):
869                x_sweep = np.tile(medians, (n_grid, 1))
870                x_sweep[:, term.feature] = feat_grids[term.feature]
871                pdep = self.partial_dependence(i, x_sweep)
872                fv = feat_grids[term.feature]
873                beta = self.coef_[self._coef_slices[i][0]]
874                ax.plot(fv, pdep, 'C4-', lw=2)
875                ax.axvspan(fv[0], feat_mins[term.feature], alpha=0.06, color='red')
876                ax.axvspan(feat_maxs[term.feature], fv[-1], alpha=0.06, color='red')
877                ax.axhline(0, color='gray', ls='--', lw=0.5)
878                ax.set_xlabel(f'x[{term.feature}]')
879                ax.set_ylabel('Contribution')
880                ax.set_title(f'l({term.feature})   beta={beta:.4f}')
881
882        fig.suptitle(
883            f'GAMCore Decomposition — {self.formula}',
884            fontsize=12, fontweight='bold',
885        )
886        return fig, np.array(fig.axes)
887
888
889# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
890#  Module-level helpers
891# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
892
893
894def _set_lams_from_combo(terms: List[_Term], l_combo: tuple) -> None:
895    lam_idx = 0
896    for t in terms:
897        if isinstance(t, _TensorTerm):
898            n_sl = t.d
899            t.lam_per = list(l_combo[lam_idx:lam_idx + n_sl])
900            lam_idx += n_sl
901        else:
902            t.lam = float(l_combo[lam_idx])
903            lam_idx += 1
904
905
906def _assemble_penalty_from_bases(
907    bases_list: list,
908    l_combo: tuple,
909    m: int,
910    fit_intercept: bool,
911    out: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
912) -> np.ndarray:
913    if out is None:
914        P = np.zeros((m, m))
915    else:
916        out[:] = 0
917        P = out
918    lam_idx = 0
919    for base_mats, (start, end), n_slots in bases_list:
920        for k in range(n_slots):
921            P[start:end, start:end] += float(l_combo[lam_idx]) * base_mats[k]
922            lam_idx += 1
923    return P
924
925
926def _precompute_penalty_bases(
927    terms: List[_Term],
928    fit_intercept: bool,
929) -> Tuple[list, int]:
930    bases_list = []
931    off = 0
932    for t in terms:
933        start = off
934        pb = t.penalty_bases()
935        base_mats = [b[0] for b in pb]
936        n_slots = sum(b[1] for b in pb)
937        bases_list.append((base_mats, (start, start + t.n_coefs), n_slots))
938        off += t.n_coefs
939    m = off
940    if fit_intercept:
941        m += 1
942    return bases_list, m
943
944
945def _build_matrix_from_terms(
946    terms: List[_Term],
947    x: np.ndarray,
948    fit_intercept: bool,
949) -> np.ndarray:
950    blocks = [t.build_columns(x) for t in terms]
951    if fit_intercept:
952        blocks.append(np.ones((len(x), 1)))
953    return np.hstack(blocks)

lingam._lingam¶

Single-term penalised B-spline GAM — LinGAM class.

class lingam._lingam.LinGAM(n_splines: int = 10, lam: float = 1.0, spline_order: int = 3, constraint: str | None = None)[source]¶

Penalised B-spline GAM for a single smooth term y = f(x) + eps.

Parameters:

  • n_splines (int, default 10) – Number of B-spline basis functions K. Must satisfy K > spline_order.

  • lam (float, default 1.0) – Smoothing parameter (lambda >= 0).

  • spline_order (int, default 3) – B-spline order (polynomial degree).

  • constraint (str or None, default None) – Shape constraint for the smooth term. One of None, 'mono_inc', 'mono_dec', 'convex', 'concave', 'periodic'.

property n_coefs: int¶

Effective number of spline coefficients (reduced for periodic).

property is_fitted: bool¶
gridsearch(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], y: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], lam: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str] | None = None, n_splines: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str] | None = None, gamma: float = 1.4, robust: bool = False) → LinGAM[source]¶

Select optimal (lam, n_splines) by minimising GCV.

Always uses the fast QR+Cholesky path for standard fits. When robust=True, uses Huber IRLS within each candidate evaluation.

fit(x: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], y: Buffer | _SupportsArray[dtype[Any]] | _NestedSequence[_SupportsArray[dtype[Any]]] | complex | bytes | str | _NestedSequence[complex | bytes | str], robust: bool = False) → LinGAM[source]¶

Fit the model with current hyper-parameters.
